score_components.formula_applied: Video does not contain Task 3 content - no valid score possible

consensus_score.technique_summary: This is an educational video demonstrating Tasks 4 and 5 (suturing tasks) rather than Task 3 (Endoloop). No ligating loop deployment, foam appendage, or endoloop-specific techniques are shown.
strengths: Good demonstration of suturing techniques for Tasks 4 and 5
improvement_suggestions: Video does not contain Task 3 content - would need actual endoloop demonstration for assessment

disagreements.teacher_a_value: Educational video for Tasks 4 & 5, not Task 3
disagreements.resolution: Educational video for Tasks 4 & 5, not Task 3
disagreements.rationale: Teacher A correctly identifies this as educational content showing suturing techniques. Frame 1 shows 'FLS Pro Tip Series for Tasks 4 & 5' title slide. Frames 6-20 show needle anatomy education and suturing demonstrations on Penrose drain, not endoloop placement on foam appendage. Teacher B appears to have misinterpreted educational suturing content as endoloop task performance.
No Task 3 performance occurred in video. Teacher B's 20-second timing reflects misidentification of educational suturing content as task performance.
No valid Task 3 performance to score. Teacher B's score of 160 (180-20) is based on misidentified content.
